title: Europe’s obsession with Israel
summary_full: Israel should not be beyond examination. But applying different standards to different actors undermines the EU's claim to be an indispensable diplomatic broker in the Middle East
summary_public: Israel should not be beyond examination. But applying different standards to different actors undermines the EU's claim to be an indispensable diplomatic broker in the Middle East

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: undermines the EU's claim to be an indispensable diplomatic broker
